selected_public_datasets.name: geolife_trajectories_1_3.zip
selected_public_datasets.why: Provides labeled, time-stamped GPS trajectories with dense 1-5 second sampling that can be mapped into trip-based route playback for simulation and dashboard realism.

selected_public_datasets.name: vehicle_telematics.csv
selected_public_datasets.why: Provides ordered trip IDs, speed, efficiency, and driver-behavior events that help bound realistic startup fluctuation and telemetry jitter when deriving truck-like fuel traces.

selected_public_datasets.name: bus_fuel_sensors.csv
selected_public_datasets.why: Provides timestamped heavy-vehicle fuel_per_km, stop-time, brake, and acceleration behavior used to derive truck-style fuel traces on top of public route geometry.

not_integrated_to_avoid_noise.name: obd2_kit/*.csv
not_integrated_to_avoid_noise.reason: Useful as a sensor reference but excluded from the main dataset pipeline because GPS, trip structure, and fuel level are incomplete for Supabase-aligned outputs.

not_integrated_to_avoid_noise.name: fuel_consumption_canada.csv
not_integrated_to_avoid_noise.reason: Useful for sanity checks only; not time-series telemetry and not directly suitable for trip-sequence training.
